column4: Detail
Led process modernization and workflow redesign for SMBs to reduce costs and friction.
Delivered intuitive web and mobile solutions that aligned with business KPIs and customer satisfaction.
Conducted technical workshops and strategy sessions to align teams, optimize cross-departmental processes, and foster a culture of innovation.
Integrated AI tools, designed custom CRMs, and created inventory systems and workflow platforms.
Acted as a technical translator between field users, sales, and internal systems engineers to define scalable MVPs.
SMB Solutions: Delivered customized solutions that improved business KPIs, saved time, and reduced errors for SMB clients.
CRM Optimization: Gamified Salesforce usage and conducted hands-on training to boost CRM engagement and improve sales outcomes.
Operational Efficiency: Developed automated workflows using Google Apps Script for a nursing certification program, which reduced administrative time by 80% and eliminated data conflicts.
IoT Implementation: Prototyped and deployed IoT-based workflows and AI-triggered alerts for SMBs, improving task completion by 25% and reducing response delays by 20%.
Designed and implemented a scalable DesignOps framework, introducing dual-track agile methodologies to improve alignment between UX, engineering, and product teams.
Spearheaded the development of job scheduling workflows, prioritizing user empathy and actionable insights through research and competitive analysis.
Established a centralized documentation hub and Figma-based design library to enhance transparency, consistency, and scalability for cross-functional teams.
Embedded iterative prototyping and user testing into agile sprints, enabling continuous refinement of solutions and gathering data-driven insights.
Conducted a full audit across product, UX, and development practices to identify and resolve sources of friction and UX debt.
Embedded iterative research and live user testing sprints into the development cycle to validate and align all new feature work.
Scheduling Workflow Optimization: Achieved a 50% reduction in scheduling time and a 44% improvement in user satisfaction scores through iterative design and testing.
Centralized Design Systems: Built a Figma-based design system structured by atomic design principles and a documentation wiki that improved onboarding and decision-making for stakeholders.
Team Alignment: Implemented a "three-in-a-box" model, aligning Product, Engineering, and UX as equal partners, which improved accountability and collaboration.
Agile Implementation: Introduced dual-track agile, allowing discovery and delivery to operate in parallel, which reduced rework and accelerated iterations.
Stakeholder Buy-in: Demonstrated the value of user-centered processes through tangible results, fostering buy-in from leadership in a rapidly scaling startup environment.
Taught courses on game design, web development, iterative prototyping, and multimedia art, blending technical and creative approaches.
Designed hands-on, project-based curricula for students with diverse technical backgrounds, starting from foundational principles.
Integrated real-world software development and UX challenges into the high school curriculum to prepare students for professional environments.
Guided students through a final digital portfolio-building project to professionally showcase their work and skills for future education or careers.
Fostered a culture of cross-disciplinary teamwork, encouraging students from various artistic backgrounds to apply user-centered thinking.
Portfolio Development: Helped students secure spots in prestigious programs and internships through expertly crafted digital portfolios that demonstrated both technical and creative skills.
Real-World Readiness: Students gained hands-on experience with industry-standard tools and techniques, building confidence in their ability to contribute to professional teams.
Innovative Projects: Guided students in designing and building games, interactive websites, and multimedia art installations that merged creativity with technical precision.
Accessible Instruction: Successfully onboarded students with little to no prior tech knowledge into web and game development, demonstrating strong skills in differentiated instruction.
Interdisciplinary Connections: Helped bridge the gap between artistic and technical skill sets, empowering students to see themselves as multidimensional creators.
Developed tailored IoT-driven solutions to optimize SMB operations, including fleet management and process automation workflows.
Designed scalable, data-driven user interfaces to simplify complex business processes for both internal teams and SMB clients.
Conducted workshops to align product, engineering, and sales teams, ensuring solutions met both technical and business objectives.
Acted as a technical translator between field users, sales, and internal systems engineers to define scalable MVPs and ensure seamless software deployment.
Investigated key business and logistics opportunities and innovated on existing business processes, services, and products using connected technology to improve business KPIs.
Translated business opportunities to high impact solutions and articulated proposals to stakeholders.
Improved Operational Efficiency: Delivered IoT-driven solutions that automated fleet tracking and reduced redundancies for SMB clients.
CRM Optimization: Redesigned internal CRM usage through gamified onboarding, Salesforce customization, and usage analytics to boost engagement and improve sales outcomes.
Enhanced Employee Engagement: Designed intuitive mobile applications for workforce management, improving communication and task assignment for SMB employees.
Streamlined Internal Processes: Workshops improved internal team alignment, reducing project delays and improving product delivery times.
Conceptualized and designed interactive trade show exhibits, incorporating technologies like RFID, dynamic visual displays, and touchscreen interfaces.
Directed cross-functional teams of developers, designers, and engineers to deliver cohesive, engaging, and technically robust experiences.
Conducted user testing and prototyping to refine workflows and enhance engagement for exhibit attendees.
Managed tight project timelines and coordinated with clients to ensure all deliverables met or exceeded expectations.
Designed multimedia gaming experiences that highlighted client innovations and captured attendee attention.
Developed gamified onboarding flows and real-time interactive tools for launch-critical brand activations in high-stakes trade show environments.
Utilized rapid design sprints to prototype and deliver multi-platform, attention-grabbing interactive experiences under tight deadlines.
Award-Winning Design: Delivered interactive exhibits that became the centerpiece of trade shows, earning industry recognition for their creativity and impact.
Enhanced User Engagement: Created engaging, user-controlled animations and workflows that boosted booth foot traffic and time spent at exhibits.
Boosted Lead Capture: Designed gamified features that resulted in a massive increase in lead capture rates for clients like PepsiCo.
Strengthened Client Relationships: Delivered high-impact exhibits that demonstrated MSM’s innovative capabilities and increased client satisfaction.
Introduced rapid prototyping methodologies to modernize legacy UX processes, which reduced design cycles from months to weeks.
Spearheaded user interface design and usability studies of products in development.

Maintained a shared, detailed, and transferable documentation of findings, recommendations, practices and processes as well as design artifacts like storyboards, style guides, wireframes, and UI documentation for consistency across platforms and compliance with Accessibility and Usability Standards and Best Practices, and HIPPA/privacy requirements.
Developed a robust UX documentation system to centralize communication and ensure consistency between global onshore and offshore teams.
Designed tablet-inspired interfaces for the company's ConnectKey printers, using familiar gestures and mobile-like navigation patterns.
Facilitated product design and brainstorming exercises among key stakeholders to ensure continuous alignment in the planning and development of best-in-class customer experiences.
Oversaw the implementation and development of features, ensuring a high-quality user experience from wireframes to final product.
Accelerated Development: Reduced iteration cycles by over 50%, which allowed for actionable user feedback to be integrated in weeks instead of months.
Enhanced Usability: Delivered an award-winning, tablet-inspired interface for multifunction printers, which was praised for its intuitive design and ease of use by enterprise clients.
Unified Collaboration: Created a robust UX documentation system that unified cross-functional teams, bridging gaps between geographically dispersed stakeholders and reducing miscommunication.

Industry Recognition: The ConnectKey devices received widespread acclaim and won multiple industry accolades, including the BLI 2018 Monochrome Printer & MFP Line of the Year Award and the 2021-2022 PaceSetter Award.

Unblocked Parallel Workstreams: Eliminated a critical bottleneck by enabling user testing and development bug-fixes to occur simultaneously, directly accelerating the feedback loop and time-to-market.
Represented business requirements and advocated for the needs of the customer, clearly communicating strategy and conceptual ideas and design rationale verbally and visually.
Implemented an iterative agile process focused on rapid prototyping for user-first design and web applications development.
Redesigned internal task flows and prototyped high-fidelity vendor tools to support Request for Proposal (RFP) submissions.
Facilitated cross-functional workshops and product discussions to align engineering, operations, and business teams.
Developed responsive web and mobile interfaces for internal tools, improving usability and enhancing alignment with evolving Apple brand standards.
Streamlined Operations: Redesigned internal task flows for logistics systems, improving efficiency for Apple employees.
Vendor Success: Developed interactive prototypes that enabled staffing vendors to secure enterprise contracts with Apple.
Unified Product Vision: Facilitated product workshops and created unified UI/UX strategy proposals, which streamlined decision-making and improved vendor approval outcomes.
Agile Implementation: Implemented agile prototyping practices to bridge the gap between user feedback and technical development, accelerating product iterations.
Teaching Assistant: Served as a TA for the Human-Centered Design and Interaction Design course, mentoring students on core concepts.

Guest Speaker: Delivered guest lectures and workshops for technical courses on topics including interaction design, UX research, usability testing, rapid prototyping, and effective UX-to-developer handoffs.
Founder & Director (Crashtest): Founded and led Crashtest, a student-led organization focused on project-based learning for iterative game design, prototyping, and user testing.
Curriculum Integration: Grew Crashtest into a highly popular program that attracted national attention, leading to its formal integration into RIT's official game design curriculum.

Facilitator: Organized and led hands-on workshops, professional certification courses, game jams and training sessions on rapid prototyping and user testing for both the Crashtest and Upstate UX communities that bridged diverse disciplines, fostering a vibrant, collaborative community of emerging designers and technologists.
Community Building: Grew Crashtest to a scale and level of influence that it was adopted by faculty and institutionalized as a core component of the curriculum.
Mentorship: Mentored many students and professionals, helping participants land jobs, secure clients, and gain recognition through the Crashtest community and TA sessions.
Instructional Leadership: Led IDEO Human-Centered Design certification courses for a mixed cohort of over 100 students and working industry professionals.
Developed and led a custom tech literacy course for foreign students struggling with digital tools, enabling them to complete coursework effectively.
Curriculum Design: Independently designed and taught a comprehensive computer literacy course from the ground up to address foundational skill gaps among programming and general education students.
Tutoring: Provided one-on-one tutoring in programming (including Java), web development, and general digital literacy, tailoring support to individual learning needs.
Teaching Assistant: Assisted faculty as a Teaching Assistant for Advanced Java Programming, helping create accessible materials and facilitate classes.
Student Advocacy: Identified that many students were struggling with coursework due to a lack of basic computer skills and created a solution that was promoted by professors across the college.
Curriculum Development: Designed hands-on, project-based curricula for students with diverse technical backgrounds.
Educational Enablement: Empowered dozens of non-technical, elderly, and foreign students to succeed in their coursework by providing them with fundamental computer skills.

Instructional Impact: Helped students bridge the gap between complex technical concepts and practical application, fostering confidence and competency in programming and technology in a supportive learning environment.
Proactive Problem-Solving: Demonstrated an early aptitude for identifying systemic problems and building repeatable, scalable solutions to address them.
